channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: The 49ers fire special teams coordinator Brian Schneider, AP source says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers fired special teams coach Brian Schneider following a season when repeated blunders in the kicking contributed to a losing season, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Suns' Beal stars as a reserve in win over 76ers and makes it clear he believes he is an NBA starter
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Bradley Beal made the most of the unfamiliar role of substitute for the Phoenix Suns. That doesn't mean he had to like it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: North Dakota State wins 10th FCS title as Miller accounts for 4 TDs in 35-32 win over Montana State
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — Cam Miller ran for two touchdowns and threw for two more in his 54th consecutive start as North Dakota State's quarterback, and the Bison won their record 10th Football Championship Subdivision title, beating top-seeded and previously undefeated Montana State 35-32 on Monday nig
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Coby White stars as Bulls rally past Spurs for 114-110 victory
item.description: Coby White made a go-ahead layup with 47 seconds left, and the Chicago Bulls topped Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs 114-110 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mavericks guard Kyrie Irving out due to bulging disk in his back, no timeline for return
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Dallas guard Kyrie Irving is expected to miss one to two weeks with a bulging disk in his back, and Mavericks coach Jason Kidd said a timeline for his return was not immediately known.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Antetokounmpo needs 3 stitches in finger and returns to post a triple-double in win over Raptors
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo needed three stitches to close a cut near the base of his right pinkie against Toronto on Monday night, and returned to the game to finish his fourth triple-double of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Giants decide to keep Schoen, Daboll
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The New York Giants made a swift decision Monday morning in keeping general manager Joe Schoen and head coach Brian Daboll. Giants fans are upset because they wanted change. Owners John Mara and Steve Tisch thought otherwise. The results are the results. They have been terrible.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Kurtenbach: The 49ers carry a huge advantage into the 2025 offseason
item.description: San Francisco 49ers: The Niners' veteran leaders took responsibility for a bad season and promised a return to excellence in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Dieter Kurtenbach, The Mercury News

item.title: Tennessee, nation's lone unbeaten, strengthens grip on No. 1; WVU, Michigan, Utah St enter AP Top 25
item.description: Tennessee tightened its grip on No. 1 in the AP Top 25 on Monday following a pair of lopsided wins, including one over SEC rival Arkansas, that left the Volunteers as the only undefeated team in men's Division I college basketball.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Emotions pour from McCaffrey, Ward, Pearsall as 49ers clear out lockers
item.description: Christian McCaffrey, Charvarius Ward and Ricky Pearsall are among the 49ers hit hard by the emotional tolls this past season.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Sheel Seidler, wife of late Padres owner, sues in-laws for control of the team
item.description: Sheel Seidler, the wife of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler, has sued two of her brothers-in-law in an attempt to prevent a third Seidler brother from taking control of the team rather than her.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Novak Djokovic says he still feels 'trauma' when he travels to Australia because of his deportation
item.description: Novak Djokovic said he still feels “a bit of trauma” when he travels to Australia, stemming from his deportation in 2022 because he was not vaccinated against COVID-19.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Final field for 2025 Farmers Insurance Open in San Diego shaping up
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open is set to take place in San Diego from January 22-25, 2025, featuring a field of major championship winners, past winners, and players with San Diego ties. Tickets went on sale in October.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Tyreek Hill channels Antonio Brown after remarks about future with Dolphins
item.description: Miami Dolphins wide receiver Tyreek Hill channeled his inner Antonio Brown with a profile picture change a day after he suggested he wanted to leave the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dolphins' frustrated Tyreek Hill appears to indicate he wants out of Miami after loss to Jets
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — A frustrated Tyreek Hill might want out of Miami. The star wide receiver appeared to indicate after the Dolphins' 32-20 loss to the New York Jets on Sunday that he could want to play elsewhere next season.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions beat Vikings 31-9, win NFC North and No. 1 seed, dropping division rivals to No. 5
item.description: Jahmyr Gibbs was the game-breaking player the Detroit Lions needed to get their high-powered offense in gear — and give them a first-round bye and home-field advantage in the NFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New Orleans Saints, NFL to donate $1 million to victims of truck attack
item.description: The relief contributions come after Shamsud-Din Jabbar drove a rented truck into a crowd on New Year’s Day on Bourbon Street, killing 14 people.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Derrick Rose to open pop-up flower shop in the Loop Thursday
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Former Chicago Bull and NBA MVP Derrick Rose is opening a pop-up flower shop for one day only in the Loop Thursday. According to a post on Rose's Instagram account, "Rose's Flower Shop" will be open from 12-4 p.m. at 350 North State Street.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Gauff and Fritz put US in United Cup semifinals. Kazakhstan beats Germany to advance
item.description: Coco Gauff and Taylor Fritz powered the U.S., tournament winner two years ago, into the semifinals of the United Cup mixed teams tennis event on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sugar Bowl postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS — The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame has been postponed after a truck plowed into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away early Wednesday, killing at least 10 people.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies improve to 13-1 after 69-64 win over Nevada
item.description: RENO, Nev. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men's basketball (13-1, 3-0 MW) closed out 2024 with a victory, wrapping up an undefeated three-game road trip with a 69-64 win over Nevada at the Lawlor Event Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes blown out in Big 12 opener by Baylor, 81-56
item.description: WACO, Tex. (AP) - It was a rude awakening to the Big 12 Conference for the Runnin' Utes. V.J. Edgecombe scored 19 points, three other Baylor players had 15 and the 25th-ranked Bears led throughout in an 81-56 win over Utah on Tuesday in the Big 12 opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PHOTOS: Blues, Blackhawks close 2024 with the Winter Classic
item.description: It's Winter Classic Day in the Windy City on New Year's Eve. The ultimate outdoor hockey showdown between the cross-state rival St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks is underway.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 75, Windward 74
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO)-Montgomery playing in the fifth place game on Monday afternoon went to overtime for bonus basketball against Windward and won 75-74. Lead by Senior, JJ Sanchez who poured in 27. While fellow senior Devin Hamilton added 18, and Alek Sanchez, twin of JJ hit for 12.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
